response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad experience and evident craftsmanship (TDD, open source, teaching), but they do not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; the candidate has only a brief C/C++ stint (~7 months at National Instruments) plus a thesis project. Their systems-level work is primarily in DLang and Node.js, and while the Sociomantic role shows real low-latency, high-throughput experience, there is no sustained cloud compute platform, distributed-systems infrastructure, or formal technical leadership track record at the scale this JD demands.
strengths: Real low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering culture contributor: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring via courses and code katas
Long-running open source platform ownership (GISCollective) including Kubernetes deployment
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; primary systems language is DLang, not C++
No formal technical leadership role managing priorities, deadlines, and cross-team alignment
Career is predominantly web/full-stack product work, not large-scale cloud compute or infrastructure platforms

key_factors.factor: Limited cloud platform / distributed infrastructure depth
